title: vendor: update containers/storage
body:
inherit a fix for leaving SUID/SGID bits in chowned files.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @giuseppe I think i beat you with #1538 but my tests are also failing. We'll see if that happens here too.
@mheon ok :-) I am closing this in favor of #1538
